enabled.description: Enable the Sleeper fantasy football display.

league_id.description: Sleeper league ID. Recommended for reliable loading.

username.description: Sleeper username or user ID. Used to discover a league when league_id is blank.

season.description: NFL season year. Leave blank to use Sleeper's current league season.

roster_id.description: Optional roster ID for your team. Use 0 to auto-detect.

favorite_team_name.description: Optional team-name text used to auto-detect your roster.

display_mode.description: Display weekly matchup, standings, or rotate both.

show_all_matchups.description: When enabled, rotates through every league matchup instead of focusing on your roster.

max_standings_teams.description: Number of top teams to show on standings cards.

cache_seconds.description: How long to cache Sleeper API responses.

display_duration.description: How long to display the plugin in rotation.

card_rotation_seconds.description: How often to rotate between matchup and standings cards.

request_timeout.description: Sleeper API request timeout in seconds.

accent_color.description: Accent RGB color for leaders and dividers.
